description: Agent-native macOS context and guarded computer-use CLI backed by Peekaboo.

novel_features.name: Agent context dump
novel_features.description: Produce an agent-friendly Mac context bundle with active app, windows, optional screenshot, UI inspection, and clipboard preview.
novel_features.rationale: Turns local desktop state into structured context any agent can consume.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents need observability before they can safely help with desktop workflows.

novel_features.name: Markdown handoff
novel_features.description: Generate a concise markdown handoff describing the visible and active Mac context for pasting into an AI agent.
novel_features.rationale: Bridges desktop context into chat and coding agents without custom integrations.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Makes the user's current Mac state portable across agent sessions.

novel_features.name: Guarded computer-use actions
novel_features.description: Propose or execute Peekaboo-backed UI actions with dry-run defaults and explicit --execute for real clicks, typing, keys, scrolling, and focus.
novel_features.rationale: Separates observation from action so agents can propose commands before human approval.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Computer use becomes auditable shell commands instead of opaque remote control.

novel_features.name: Privacy-safe clipboard preview
novel_features.description: Inspect clipboard type and preview text safely by default, requiring --full before printing full clipboard contents.
novel_features.rationale: Clipboard contents are often sensitive and should not leak into agent prompts by accident.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Keeps agent context useful without silently exfiltrating secrets.
